title: Compared to Estimates, Textron (TXT) Q3 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Textron (TXT) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended September 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Textron (TXT) Beats on Q3 Earnings, Ups '23 EPS View
text: Textron's (TXT) Q3 revenues total $3,343 million, which misses the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 3.1%. However, the reported figure increases 8.6% from the year-ago quarter's reported number.

title: Textron (TXT) Surpasses Q3 Earnings Estimates
text: Textron (TXT) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.49 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.27 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.06 per share a year ago.

title: Textron raises profit forecast as private jet demand holds steady
text: Textron Inc on Thursday raised its full-year adjusted earnings forecast after beating estimates for quarterly profit, betting on demand for its business jets despite higher prices.

title: Textron Reports Third Quarter 2023 Results; Raises Full-Year EPS Outlook
text: PROVIDENCE, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) today reported third quarter 2023 income from continuing operations of $1.35 per share, as compared to $1.06 per share in the third quarter of 2022. Adjusted income from continuing operations, a non-GAAP measure that is defined and reconciled to GAAP in an attachment to this release, was $1.49 per share for the third quarter of 2023, compared to $1.15 per share in the third quarter of 2022. “In the quarter, we saw higher overall revenu.

title: Textron Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: PROVIDENCE, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Board of Directors of Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT) today declared a quarterly dividend of $0.02 per share on the company's Common Stock. All dividends will be paid on January 1, 2024 to holders of record at the close of business on December 15, 2023. About Textron Inc. title: RTX Q3 Earnings Surpass Estimates by 5%, Sales View Raised
text: RTX's third-quarter adjusted sales of $18,952 million beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $18,709 million by 1.3%.

title: Beechcraft King Air 360 reaches 100th delivery, continuing the legacy of the world's most popular business turboprop
text: WICHITA, Kan.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Textron Aviation today announced the delivery of the 100th Beechcraft King Air 360 turboprop to Comprehensive Blood and Cancer Center (CBCC), a longtime Textron Aviation customer. This delivery further solidifies the Beechcraft King Air's place as the world's most popular family of business turboprop aircraft. title: Textron Aviation names flyExclusive fleet launch customer for newly-announced Citation CJ3 Gen2
text: LAS VEGAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Textron Aviation, a Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT) company, today announced that flyExclusive has been named the fleet launch customer for the Cessna Citation CJ3 Gen2. The news came during the company's press conference at the National Business Aviation Association - Business Aviation Convention & Exhibition (NBAA-BACE) event in Las Vegas. title: A Deep Dive Into Textron Stock: A Cautious 'Buy'
text: Textron Inc. showed promising financial growth in Q2 2023, with significant revenue upticks in its Aviation and Industrial segments. The company increased its EPS guidance for 2023 and has a substantial backlog for future business. The company has high earnings quality, with free cash flow exceeding net income.

title: Textron to Release Third Quarter Results on October 26, 2023
text: PROVIDENCE, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) will release its third quarter 2023 financial results on Thursday morning, October 26, 2023. Textron will also host a conference call at 8:00 a.m. (Eastern) to discuss the results and the company's outlook. The call will be available via webcast at www.textron.com or by direct dial at (844) 867-6169 in the U.S. or (409) 207-6975 outside of the U.S.; Access Code: 7265882. In addition, the call will be recorded and available for playback.
